JOI-BLACK_HOLE_POWER.title: Black Hole
JOI-BLACK_HOLE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if this has 10 or more stacks, lose HP equal to the number of stacks and remove this power.
JOI-BLACK_HOLE_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, if this has 10 or more stacks, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP and remove this power.
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_POWER.title: White Hole
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, deal damage equal to the number of stacks to ALL enemies, [gold]Summon[/gold] 1, then lose 1 stack.
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies, [gold]Summon[/gold] 1, then lose 1 stack.
JOI-BIRTH_POWER.title: Birth
JOI-BIRTH_POWER.description: Whenever Black Hole triggers, summon a ZhouXin with HP equal to Black Hole stacks. If one already exists, increase its HP by that amount.
JOI-BIRTH_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever Black Hole triggers, summon a ZhouXin with HP equal to Black Hole stacks. If one already exists, increase its HP by that amount.
JOI-OMNISCIENT_POWER.title: Omniscient
JOI-OMNISCIENT_POWER.description: Whenever you gain Black Hole, also gain that many White Hole stacks.
JOI-OMNISCIENT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain Black Hole, also gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] White Hole stacks.
JOI-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.title: Event Horizon
JOI-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.description: Whenever you gain Black Hole, gain that much Block.
JOI-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain X Black Hole, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue]×X Block.
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_LENS_POWER.title: Gravitational Lens
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_LENS_POWER.description: Whenever your White Hole stacks change, deal damage to a random enemy.
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_LENS_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever your White Hole stacks change, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
JOI-GRAVITY_FIELD_POWER.title: Gravity Field
JOI-GRAVITY_FIELD_POWER.description: Whenever you gain White Hole, deal damage to ALL enemies.
JOI-GRAVITY_FIELD_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain White Hole, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
JOI-IDOL_CHARM_POWER.title: Charm
JOI-IDOL_CHARM_POWER.description: Damage is redirected to this unit instead. Only one Charm can exist on the field.
JOI-IDOL_CHARM_POWER.smartDescription: Damage is redirected to this unit instead. Only one Charm can exist on the field.
JOI-VACUUM_FLUCTUATION_POWER.title: Vacuum Fluctuation
JOI-VACUUM_FLUCTUATION_POWER.description: Each turn, the first time you gain [gold]Black Hole[/gold] or [gold]White Hole[/gold], gain 1 Energy.
JOI-VACUUM_FLUCTUATION_POWER.smartDescri: Each turn, the first time you gain [gold]Black Hole[/gold] or [gold]White Hole[/gold], gain 1 Energy.
JOI-SLEEP_POWER.title: Sleep
JOI-SLEEP_POWER.description: Cannot act. Gains 1 Strength at the start of turn. Reduces by 1 at the end of turn.
JOI-STORED_CARD_POWER.title: Stored Card
JOI-STORED_CARD_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, Axis Core plays the stored card. If Axis Core dies, the card is returned to your hand.
JOI-STORED_CARD_POWER.smartDescription: [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card stored. Axis Core plays it at the start of your turn. If Axis Core dies, the card is returned to your hand.
JOI-SLEEP_POWER.smartDescription: Cannot act for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s). Gains 1 Strength at the start of turn.
JOI-STELLAR_REQUIEM_POWER.title: Stellar Requiem
JOI-STELLAR_REQUIEM_POWER.description: Whenever an enemy's Sleep expires, gain White Hole and apply Vulnerable to that enemy.
JOI-STELLAR_REQUIEM_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever an enemy's Sleep expires, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] White Hole and apply 1 Vulnerable to that enemy.
JOI-UNIVERSAL_GRAVITATION_POWER.title: Universal Gravitation
JOI-UNIVERSAL_GRAVITATION_POWER.descript: Whenever a Charmed enemy takes damage, gain Black Hole.
JOI-UNIVERSAL_GRAVITATION_POWER.smartDes: Whenever a Charmed enemy takes damage, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Black Hole.
JOI-TIME_DILATION_POWER.title: Time Dilation
JOI-TIME_DILATION_POWER.description: Cards drawn this turn cost 1 less. Whenever you play a card, apply Black Hole to yourself. Removed at end of turn.
JOI-TIME_DILATION_POWER.smartDescription: Cards drawn this turn cost 1 less. Whenever you play a card, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Black Hole to yourself.
JOI-STORED_CARD_POWER.title: Stored Card
JOI-STORED_CARD_POWER.description: At the start of next turn, play the stored attack card.
JOI-STORED_CARD_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of next turn, play the stored attack card.
JOI-AXIS_CORE_HANDSOME_POWER.title: Axis Core Handsome
JOI-AXIS_CORE_HANDSOME_POWER.description: Axis Core plays stored cards twice.
JOI-AXIS_CORE_HANDSOME_POWER.smartDescri: Axis Core plays stored cards twice.
JOI-STORAGE_POWER.title: Bond
JOI-STORAGE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, if Axis Core is alive, add a [gold]Store[/gold] to your hand.
JOI-STORAGE_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, if Axis Core is alive, add a [gold]Store[/gold] to your hand.
JOI-ORANGE_EXPERT_POWER.title: Orange Expert
JOI-ORANGE_EXPERT_POWER.description: Whenever an Orange card is played, deal damage to a random enemy.
JOI-ORANGE_EXPERT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever an Orange card is played, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
JOI-ORANGE_TREE_POWER.title: Orange Tree
JOI-ORANGE_TREE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, Summon and add Oranges to your hand.
JOI-ORANGE_TREE_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] and add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Orange(s)[/gold] to your hand.
JOI-PERIODIC_TABLE_POWER.title: Periodic Table
JOI-PERIODIC_TABLE_POWER.description: At the start of next turn, choose a card from your draw pile and add it to your hand, then remove this power.
JOI-PERIODIC_TABLE_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of next turn, choose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s) from your draw pile and add to your hand, then remove this power.
JOI-BOND_POWER.title: Bond
JOI-BOND_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, if Axis Core is in play, gain 1 Energy.
JOI-BOND_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, if Axis Core is in play, gain 1 Energy.
JOI-SINGULARITY_POWER.title: Singularity
JOI-SINGULARITY_POWER.description: At the start of next turn, gain 10 Black Hole, then remove this power.
JOI-SINGULARITY_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Black Hole, then remove this power.
JOI-COSMIC_CONSTANT_POWER.title: Cosmic Constant
JOI-COSMIC_CONSTANT_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, apply Black Hole and White Hole to yourself.
JOI-COSMIC_CONSTANT_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of each turn, apply Black Hole and White Hole to yourself.
JOI-ZHOU_XIN_THORNS_POWER.title: Thorns Guard
JOI-ZHOU_XIN_THORNS_POWER.description: When you take attack damage, deal damage equal to stacks to the attacker. Removed when Axis Core dies.
JOI-ZHOU_XIN_THORNS_POWER.smartDescripti: When you take attack damage, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to the attacker. Removed when Axis Core dies.
